name: Signature Design by Ashley Realyn Three Drawer Nightstand Chipped White : With USB Port & Cable Management
description: Elevating the art of traditional cottage styling, this nightstand is your dream bedroom retreat realized. Antiqued two-tone aesthetic blends a chipped white with a distressed wood finished top for added charm. Framed drawer fronts and decorative corbels add refinement, while bail pulls in a dark bronze-tone finish lend a classic touch. Subtly placed USB/electrical outlets meld vintage inspiration with modern convenience. Signature Design by Ashley is a registered trademark of Ashley Furniture Industries, Inc.
